query:
INSERT INTO prompt_runs (
            id, prompt_id, provider, provider_model_version, started_at,
            raw_response, request_parameters, status, error_kind, created_at
        )
        VALUES (
            $1, $2, 'x', 'y', now(), '{}'::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb,
            'failed', 'not_a_real_kind', now()
        )
